EventDescriptions.EventDescription: XDG Autostart file {object.fullpath} was changed on host {event_src.host}
XDG Autostart file {object.fullpath} was changed using suspicious file "{subject.process.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed XDG Autostart file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed XDG Autostart file {object.fullpath} using suspicious file "{subject.process.name}" on host {event_src.host}
